description: Pre-fix state for #1343 (epic #1338 Slice 2). Intake-chat sessions only live in process-memory; restart wipes everything. There is no intake_event row and no Session.intentId column. Audit-bundle download relies on a still-live process. Crash mid-intake = data loss.
bug_class: Intake hash-chain cannot survive a process restart. Audit-bundle download is the only output the spike produces; it requires the source session to still be in memory. Once Slice 2 lands, the chain is durable and the Tune tab gains a CallerAttribute(scope='INTAKE_CHAT') projection that surfaces the captured Q&A.
